description: The ScreenController component is used mainly in desktop and is found on user roots. It is used to control the screen controls like third person in the game.

fields.TransitionSpeed: How fast to transition the camera between different modes.
fields.PointerController: The pointer component handling inspector interactions.
fields.ActiveTargetting: The view controller targeting mechanism for stuff like UIX targeting.
fields.Head: The component handling head control.
fields.LeftHand: The component handing the left hand control.
fields.RightHand: The component handling the right hand control.
fields._firstPerson: The component to handle first person object targeting.
fields._thirdPerson: The component to handle third person object targeting.
fields._uiCamera: The targetting controller used for UIX targeting.
fields._freeformCamera: The targetting controller used for third person targetting like freeform camera mode in desktop.
